items.source: Gives agents a real-browser tool path with user state and native events.
items.zhCN: Gives 智能体 a real-浏览器 tool 路径具备 user state 和 native events。

items.source: Gives agents durable structural orientation, blast-radius queries and CI trust gates.
items.zhCN: Gives 智能体 durable structural orientation，blast-radius queries 和 CI trust gates。

items.source: Gives an agent a phone-like actuator layer: tap, swipe, navigate, read UI, and operate apps through Android accessibility APIs.
items.zhCN: Gives an 智能体 a phone-like actuator layer：tap，swipe，navigate，read UI，和 operate apps through Android accessibility APIs。

items.source: Gives coding agents an operational playbook for remote GPU lifecycle management.
items.zhCN: Gives coding 智能体 an operational playbook 面向 remote GPU lifecycle management。

items.source: Gives coding agents grounded structural maps instead of relying only on embedding/search context.
items.zhCN: Gives coding 智能体 grounded structural maps instead of relying only on embedding/search 上下文。

items.source: Gives models native Android tools and embedded Python runtime.
items.zhCN: Gives models native Android tools 和 embedded Python 运行时。

items.zhCN: Go CLI to discover exposed MCP servers，A2A Agent Cards 和 open LLM APIs 具备 capability 和 auth-state output。

items.zhCN: 技术类 / Terminal Coding Agent

items.source: Terminal coding agent that defaults to local models through Ollama/LM Studio, with optional cloud fallback, 100+ tools, browser capability, vision, live artifacts, and guardrails.
items.zhCN: Terminal coding 智能体 that defaults to 本地 models through Ollama/LM Studio，具备 optional cloud fallback，100+ tools，浏览器 capability，vision，live artifacts，和 guardrails。

items.source: Terminal coding-agent baseline for comparison with Gemini CLI and opencode.
items.zhCN: Terminal coding 智能体基线面向 comparison 具备 Gemini CLI 和 opencode。

items.source: Terminal UI that indexes local Claude Code, Codex, Grok and GitHub Copilot Chat sessions into one searchable browser.
items.zhCN: Terminal UI that indexes 本地 Claude Code，Codex，Grok 和 GitHub Copilot Chat 会话 into one searchable 浏览器。

items.source: Terminal workspace, plugins, remote dev and agent workflow framing align with long-running agent control.
items.zhCN: Terminal 工作空间，plugins，remote dev 和智能体工作流 framing align 具备 long-running 智能体 control。

items.source: Terminal-first Gemini coding and automation agent with repo understanding, tool execution, and developer workflow integration.
items.zhCN: Terminal-first Gemini coding 和 automation 智能体具备 repo understanding，tool execution，和 developer 工作流 integration。

items.source: Terminal-native coding agent for delegating code edits and repo work from the command line.
items.zhCN: Terminal-native coding 智能体面向 delegating 代码编辑和 repo work from the command line。

items.source: Terminal-native coding agent optimized for local 7B-20B models using budgeted context, forgiving tool parsing, TODO decomposition, patch-first editing, traces, and local memory.
items.zhCN: Terminal-native coding 智能体 optimized 面向本地 7B-20B models using budgeted 上下文，forgiving tool parsing，TODO decomposition，patch-first editing，traces，和本地 memory。

items.source: Test against a small maintenance workflow after reviewing permissions and runner assumptions.
items.zhCN: 测试对比 a small maintenance 工作流 after reviewing 权限和 runner assumptions。

items.source: Test next cycle if browser-agent reliability is the focus.
items.zhCN: 测试 next cycle if 浏览器-智能体 reliability is the focus。

items.source: Test on a small agent-authored repo and check whether it reconstructs prompt/context provenance with low friction.
items.zhCN: 测试 on a small 智能体-authored repo 和 check whether it reconstructs prompt/上下文 provenance 具备 low friction。

items.source: Test on Chinese/English sensitive snippets and compare redaction quality against PasteGuard-style proxy approaches.
items.zhCN: 测试 on Chinese/English sensitive snippets 和比较 redaction quality 对比 PasteGuard-style proxy approaches。

items.source: Test on fast-moving frontend/backend libraries where hallucinated APIs are common.
items.zhCN: 测试 on fast-moving frontend/backend libraries where hallucinated APIs are common。

items.source: Test on one dynamic internal app and compare selector stability against Playwright codegen and hand-written locators.
items.zhCN: 测试 on one dynamic internal app 和比较 selector stability 对比 Playwright codegen 和 hand-written locators。

items.source: Test on Windows for Codex/Claude parallelism, browser automation, and handoff stability.
items.zhCN: 测试 on Windows 面向 Codex/Claude parallelism，浏览器 automation，和 handoff stability。

items.source: Test with APIs that change often, such as React, Next.js, Supabase, or Stripe documentation.
items.zhCN: 测试具备 APIs that change often，such as React，Next.js，Supabase，或 Stripe documentation。

items.source: Test with throwaway or low-risk accounts on GitHub, YouTube, and Reddit first; avoid primary-account cookies until the credential model is reviewed.
items.zhCN: 测试具备 throwaway 或 low-risk accounts on GitHub，YouTube，和 Reddit first；avoid primary-account cookies until the credential model is reviewed。

items.source: The agent drives real browser tools during authoring, then Hover deterministically saves the same selectors into normal Playwright specs so CI runs without model calls.
items.zhCN: The 智能体 drives real 浏览器 tools during authoring，then Hover deterministically saves the same selectors into normal Playwright specs so CI runs 无需 model calls。

items.source: The agent loop is designed around small-model weaknesses: context budgeting, parser repair, tool routing, decomposition, fallback escalation, and observability.
items.zhCN: The 智能体 loop is designed around small-model weaknesses：上下文 budgeting，parser repair，tool routing，decomposition，fallback escalation，和 observability。

items.source: The AI surface is not a chat widget bolted on later; it exposes one agent backend across app UI, mobile, team chat and generative UI components.
items.zhCN: The AI surface is not a chat widget bolted on later；it exposes one 智能体 backend across app UI，mobile，team chat 和 generative UI components。

items.source: The browser becomes the agent runtime boundary: browsing, tool execution, privacy control, and user-visible automation are treated as product primitives.
items.zhCN: The 浏览器 becomes the 智能体运行时 boundary：browsing，tool execution，privacy control，和 user-可见 automation are treated as product primitives。

items.source: The browser becomes the agent runtime: tab control, extension packaging, sandboxed JS/WASM compute, local artifacts, manifests and update feeds are first-class pieces.
items.zhCN: The 浏览器 becomes the 智能体运行时：tab control，extension packaging，sandboxed JS/WASM compute，本地 artifacts，manifests 和 update feeds are first-class pieces。

items.source: The browser is exposed as an MCP-native tool surface tuned for agent observation/action loops, snapshots, stealth, and command efficiency.
items.zhCN: The 浏览器 is exposed as an MCP-native tool surface tuned 面向智能体 observation/action loops，snapshots，stealth，和 command efficiency。

items.source: The browser is treated as an agent environment driven by visual understanding, task goals, and action planning.
items.zhCN: The 浏览器 is treated as an 智能体 environment driven by visual understanding，task goals，和 action planning。

items.source: The CLI is built around iterative LLM planning, tool use, code edits, and command execution.
items.zhCN: The CLI is built around iterative LLM planning，tool use，代码编辑，和命令执行。

items.source: The core abstraction is agent-readable HTML plus render pipeline, with `.claude-plugin`, `.codex-plugin`, examples, docs, and packages that make video generation a tool-using agent task.
items.zhCN: The core abstraction is 智能体-readable HTML 加上 render pipeline，具备 `.claude-plugin`，`.codex-plugin`，examples，docs，和 packages that make video generation a tool-using 智能体 task。

items.source: The core gameplay loop is streamed in-character dialogue and relationship/world-state evolution driven by a local LLM endpoint.
items.zhCN: The core gameplay loop is streamed in-character dialogue 和 relationship/world-state evolution driven by a 本地 LLM endpoint。

items.source: The core loop is LLM planning, tool use, terminal interaction, and code editing, with cache-aware economics as a product differentiator.
items.zhCN: The core loop is LLM planning，tool use，终端 interaction，和 code editing，具备 cache-aware economics as a product differentiator。

items.source: The core product is a coordinated agent swarm with model diversity, scheduling, tools, evals and CTF task automation rather than a passive security guide.
items.zhCN: The core product is a coordinated 智能体 swarm 具备 model diversity，scheduling，tools，evals 和 CTF task automation 而不是 a passive security 指南。

items.source: The core product is session orchestration across many agent CLIs with TUI/Web access, plugins, sounds, settings, and git/watch support.
items.zhCN: The core product is session orchestration across many 智能体 CLIs 具备 TUI/Web access，plugins，sounds，settings，和 git/观察支持。

items.source: The core product object is an agent workflow canvas with tools, knowledge, integrations, and copilot-assisted flow editing.
items.zhCN: The core product object is an 智能体工作流 canvas 具备 tools，knowledge，integrations，和 copilot-assisted flow editing。

items.source: The core workflow is AI coding session orchestration, context management, and agent task handling.
items.zhCN: The core 工作流 is AI coding session orchestration，上下文 management，和智能体 task handling。

items.source: The harness layer provides continuity, memory, execution, and identity around interchangeable models.
items.zhCN: The harness layer provides continuity，memory，execution，和 identity around interchangeable models。

items.source: The LLM is the input-method engine, choosing full-sentence Chinese output in the OS text pipeline rather than augmenting a separate writing app.
items.zhCN: The LLM is the input-method engine，choosing full-sentence Chinese output in the OS text pipeline 而不是 augmenting a separate writing app。

items.source: The output artifact is explicitly optimized for Cursor, Claude, Codex, and similar agents, turning code analysis into agent-ready build prompts.
items.zhCN: The output artifact is explicitly optimized 面向 Cursor，Claude，Codex，和 similar 智能体，turning code analysis into 智能体-ready 构建 prompts。

items.source: The product centers on agent execution environment, workflow, and tool access rather than a generic chat interface.
items.zhCN: The product centers on 智能体 execution environment，工作流，和 tool access 而不是 a generic chat interface。

items.source: The product experience is built around AI reading repository context and producing actionable code intelligence.
items.zhCN: The product experience is built around AI reading 仓库上下文和 producing actionable code intelligence。

items.source: The product is a memory substrate for agent sessions: MCP tools, local SQLite, graph dashboard, compose/npm/pyproject packaging and tests.
items.zhCN: The product is a memory substrate 面向智能体会话：MCP tools，本地 SQLite，graph 仪表盘，compose/npm/pyproject packaging 和 tests。

items.source: The product is an agent skill operating system: routing, diagnostics, content systems, decision records, learning flows, state save/restore and report generation are encoded as reusable agent workflows.
items.zhCN: The product is an 智能体 skill operating system：routing，diagnostics，content systems，decision records，learning flows，state save/restore 和 report generation are encoded as reusable 智能体工作流。

items.source: The product is an AI operating workspace: LLM chat, agent tools, memory, research, documents, calendar/email and model serving converge into one self-hosted app.
items.zhCN: The product is an AI operating 工作空间：LLM chat，智能体 tools，memory，研究，documents，calendar/email 和 model serving converge into one 自托管 app。

items.source: The product is not a wrapper around chat; identity, persistence, multimodal interaction, and relationship memory are the core product primitives.
items.zhCN: The product is not a 封装 around chat；identity，persistence，multimodal interaction，和 relationship memory are the core product primitives。

items.source: The product layer is the operating surface around the agent: remote access, session activity, notifications, timeline branching, GitHub issues/PR context and project actions.
items.zhCN: The product layer is the operating surface around the 智能体：remote access，session 活跃度，notifications，timeline branching，GitHub issues/PR 上下文和 project actions。

items.source: The product loop is agentic coding: inspect project, edit files, run commands, check failures, and revise through a terminal UI.
items.zhCN: The product loop is 智能体编码：检查 project，edit files，run commands，check failures，和 revise through a 终端 UI。

items.source: The product loop is agentic coding: inspect repo, edit files, run commands, and produce reviewable patches.
items.zhCN: The product loop is 智能体编码：检查 repo，edit files，run commands，和 produce reviewable patches。

items.source: The product manages a fleet of agents rather than a single assistant, turning planning, execution, feedback repair, and PR lifecycle into an agent-native workflow.
items.zhCN: The product manages a fleet of 智能体而不是 a single assistant，turning planning，execution，feedback repair，和 PR lifecycle into an 智能体-native 工作流。

items.source: The product object is an agent group with task decomposition, coordination, and context flow.
items.zhCN: The product object is an 智能体 group 具备 task decomposition，coordination，和上下文 flow。

items.source: The product surface is organized around graph-enhanced retrieval and LLM usage.
items.zhCN: The 产品界面/入口 is organized around graph-enhanced retrieval 和 LLM usage。

items.source: The product surface is the coding agent itself: local workspace, provider routing, agent execution, and desktop app packaging are core to the repo.

items.source: The product treats agents as workspace participants that can be routed, coordinated, and deployed inside a shared human-agent environment.
items.zhCN: The product treats 智能体 as 工作空间 participants that can be routed，coordinated，和 deployed inside a shared 人机协作智能体 environment。

items.source: The product treats the coding agent as an execution substrate and adds process memory, stages, host specs, quality gates, and delivery artifacts around it.
items.zhCN: The product treats the coding 智能体 as an execution substrate 和 adds process memory，stages，host specs，quality gates，和 delivery artifacts around it。

items.source: The product wraps code context in a persona-adaptive UI with architectural layers and language concepts, making agent comprehension inspectable rather than hidden in chat.
items.zhCN: The product wraps code 上下文 in a persona-adaptive UI 具备 architectural layers 和 language concepts，making 智能体 comprehension inspectable 而不是 hidden in chat。

items.source: The repository changes cross-session agent behavior through recall, consolidation, local graph storage, and IDE/MCP integrations.
items.zhCN: The 仓库 changes cross-session 智能体 behavior through recall，consolidation，本地 graph storage，和 IDE/MCP integrations。

items.source: The terminal multiplexer is designed for agents to read terminals, drive a browser, run in parallel, and hand tasks to each other.
items.zhCN: The 终端 multiplexer is designed 面向智能体 to read terminals，drive a 浏览器，run in parallel，和 hand tasks to each other。

items.source: The terminal, repository, file edits, shell commands, and model reasoning become one agentic coding loop.
items.zhCN: The 终端，仓库，文件编辑，shell 命令，和模型推理 become one 智能体编码 loop。

items.source: The user value centers on local, secure, personal agent behavior rather than cloud chat alone.
items.zhCN: The user value centers on 本地，secure，personal 智能体 behavior 而不是 cloud chat alone。

items.source: The workflow chains multimodal clip understanding, story writing, cloned-voice narration, video rendering, human approval, and publishing into one agentic production loop.
items.zhCN: The 工作流 chains multimodal clip understanding，story writing，cloned-voice narration，video rendering，人工批准，和 publishing into one 智能体式 production loop。

items.source: The workflow is agent-native: coding CLIs navigate career pages, reason over CV/job fit, personalize PDFs, update trackers, deduplicate applications and keep a TUI/dashboard view of the pipeline.
items.zhCN: The 工作流 is 智能体-native：coding CLIs navigate career pages，reason over CV/job fit，personalize PDFs，update trackers，deduplicate applications 和 keep a TUI/仪表盘 view of the pipeline。

items.source: The workspace model centers on configurable agents that chat, call tools, delegate to sub-agents, use RAG/memory, and stream results across many providers.
items.zhCN: The 工作空间 model centers on configurable 智能体 that chat，call tools，delegate to sub-智能体，use RAG/memory，和 stream results across many providers。

items.source: Thin MCP wrapper around one API surface; insufficient independent workflow/product depth.
items.zhCN: Thin MCP 封装 around one API surface；insufficient independent 工作流/product depth。

items.zhCN: Thin single-service MCP 封装具备 limited standalone 工作流/产品界面/入口。

items.source: Try on a non-critical repo and compare with current coding-agent flows.
items.zhCN: Try on a non-critical repo 和比较具备当前 coding 智能体 flows。

items.source: Try on a small Codex/Claude Code repo and evaluate whether the stage model produces useful PRD/architecture/QA artifacts without slowing iteration.
items.zhCN: Try on a small Codex/Claude Code repo 和 evaluate whether the stage model produces useful PRD/architecture/QA artifacts 无需 slowing iteration。

items.source: Try on a small coding-agent task and compare receipt quality.
items.zhCN: Try on a small coding 智能体 task 和比较 receipt quality。

items.zhCN: Try on one contained repo task 和比较 edit quality，上下文处理，和 rollback 工作流。

items.source: Try on one medium codebase and compare usefulness against tree-sitter symbol search.
items.zhCN: Try on one medium codebase 和比较 usefulness 对比 tree-sitter symbol search。

items.zhCN: Try on this machine in read-only mode once session 路径 handling is reviewed；useful 面向 cross-thread recall 和 automation continuity。

items.source: Try on this repo and one large codebase; measure Codex/Claude Code tool-call and token reduction.
items.zhCN: Try on this repo 和 one large codebase；measure Codex/Claude Code 工具调用和 token reduction。

items.zhCN: Try 具备 a real document folder；检查 citation quality，file exclusions，和本地-default privacy claims。

items.zhCN: Try 具备 a simple mechanical part prompt 和 measure whether structured JSON 加上 preview is enough 面向智能体 self-correction。

items.source: Try with Codex/Claude hooks; good candidate for lightweight internal agent-status experiment.
items.zhCN: Try 具备 Codex/Claude hooks；good candidate 面向 lightweight internal 智能体-status experiment。
